name: City of Edmonton Property Assessment Data
useInDemo: Public assessment context and field calibration only. Not used as MLS sold-data evidence.
caveat: Assessment data is not a licensed comparable-sales feed and does not verify sale prices in this demo.

name: City of Calgary Historical Property Assessments
useInDemo: Public assessment context and Alberta municipal data provenance reference.
caveat: Assessment records are distinct from MLS sold-data and are not treated as live sale comparables.

name: City of Calgary Residential Property Assessments Explanation
useInDemo: Methodology context for residential assessment concepts.
caveat: Used for product research context only, not for automated appraisal or credit decisioning.
